items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement that 'Provider portfolios/reviews visible', but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a homeowner reviews portfolios, the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the visibility of provider portfolios and reviews. This lack of concrete evidence leads to a gap in satisfying the requirement.
